actions.narration: Okay, here's the tasks page. It looks...busy. Lots of options right off the bat.

Wait a minute. I thought I was supposed to create an account first. But the page says 'Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps.' That's weird. Did it automatically log me in with some default account?
I don't see a clear 'Sign Up' or 'Create Account' button anywhere. Maybe I have to sign out first? Where is the sign out?
Aha, 'Sign Out' at the top. Okay, let's try that.
(After sign out I would expect to see login / sign up options)
Given the state of confusion, I will skip to task 5: Navigate to the Mission Dashboard. I cannot seem to get out of this Tasks area and Dashboard is not accessible

friction_points: Automatically logged in without creating an account.
Confusing initial state - welcome message suggests already logged in.
Unable to locate Dashboard and other navigation
